label: Watch
llm_description: Use when the saved item is primarily video, a stream, a show, a film, a talk, or another media item the user likely wants to watch.

label: Read
llm_description: Use when the saved item is primarily an article, post, document, newsletter, thread, book, or other text the user likely wants to read.

label: Visit
llm_description: Use when the saved item is a place, venue, restaurant, shop, destination, or location the user likely wants to physically visit.

label: Buy
llm_description: Use when the saved item is a product, listing, deal, store page, or purchasing option the user likely wants to buy or consider buying.

label: Cook
llm_description: Use when the saved item is a recipe, meal idea, cooking technique, grocery prep, or other food preparation the user likely wants to cook.

label: Make
llm_description: Use when the saved item is a DIY project, craft, build guide, code pattern, or other created output. Do not use for recipes, workouts, stretches, routines, or physical therapy.

label: Do
llm_description: Use when the saved item is something the user likely wants to perform, including physical therapy, workouts, stretches, routines, practices, meditations, exercises, or drills.

label: Plan
llm_description: Use when the saved item supports planning a trip, event, appointment, itinerary, booking, schedule, logistics, renewal, or admin follow-through.

label: Learn
llm_description: Use when the saved item is explanatory or educational material where understanding a topic, method, concept, or skill is the clear reason for saving.

label: Share
llm_description: Legacy intent for captures once classified as something to send, show, recommend, or discuss. Do not use for new analysis or correction chips.

label: Research
llm_description: Legacy broad investigation intent. Use Learn for clear educational material, or leave intent blank when no concrete action is inferable.

label: Reference
llm_description: Legacy broad lookup intent. Leave intent blank unless a clearer active action such as Read, Plan, Learn, Make, Cook, or Do applies.

label: Remember
llm_description: Legacy broad memory intent. Leave intent blank when no specific active action is inferable.

label: Follow up
llm_description: Legacy task intent. Use Plan for booking, scheduling, logistics, renewals, or admin follow-through; otherwise leave intent blank unless another active action applies.
